leadText: Crabhammer (Japanese: クラブハンマー Crab Hammer) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation I. Prior to Generation III, it was the signature move of Krabby and Kingler.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations I to IV 1.2 Generation V 1.3 Generation VI onwards Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations I to IV [ edit | edit source ] Crabhammer deals damage and has an increased critical hit ratio. Crabhammer has 90 base power and 85% accuracy. Crabhammer can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 3 bonus appeal points if Rain Dance or Swords Dance was used in the previous turn. Generation V [ edit | edit source ] The accuracy of Crabhammer is increased to 90%. Generation VI onwards [ edit | edit source ] The base power of Crabhammer is increased to 100.

Critical hits land more easily. S V The target is hammered with a large pincer. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
